diversity_spec.data_structure: single flat table — all data in one sheet, each row is an independent record
diversity_spec.computation: raw data only — no formulas; model must compute everything from scratch
diversity_spec.time_dimension: no time dimension — static snapshot, no periods
diversity_spec.domain: financial risk and compliance metrics (KRIs, VaR, regulatory breach counts)

diversity_spec.data_structure: hierarchical columns — parent/child groupings in columns (e.g. Division > Sub-Division > Entity), rows represent leaf-level records
diversity_spec.computation: multi-step derived columns — intermediate computed columns that feed into final summary columns
diversity_spec.time_dimension: rolling or cumulative — requires understanding window logic (e.g. trailing 3-month average)
diversity_spec.domain: sales and revenue performance (pipeline, bookings, revenue by product/region)
